query: mixed white balance interior window photograph orange blue contrast
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / color_inconsistency — mixed white balance interior, dual color temperatures clash

response.objective_caption: The interior of a wooden sauna with vertical paneled walls and curved tiered benches. A rectangular red metal sauna heater topped with dark stones sits against the back wall, its control knobs visible along the lower front edge. A patterned felt sauna hat rests on the nearest curved bench in the foreground. Light enters from the left, illuminating the wood grain and casting shadows across the benches and wall panels.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: The interior of a wooden sauna with vertical paneled walls and curved tiered benches, captured with extreme exposure that crushes the shadows into pure black and pushes the highlights to near-white, obliterating detail across the tonal range. A rectangular red metal sauna heater topped with dark stones sits against the back wall under an intense orange-yellow sodium-vapor-like color cast that shifts all wooden surfaces into unsettling monochrome warmth. A patterned felt sauna hat rests on the nearest curved bench in the foreground. The heavy shadows and oppressive tonal choices create an atmosphere of unease throughout the compact wooden space.
